title: Wanna get mad Wanna stick up for Eva watch this
display_title: Wanna get mad Wanna stick up for Eva watch this
wikitext:
[]: Wanna get mad! Wanna stick up for Eva. watch this~ Post by KLVTZ » Sun Aug 01, 2010 5:10 pm This guy acts like he's going somewhere obviously this guy is stupid, he hates eva because he doesn't understand why Eva pilots are 14. Watch this http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J1c_dUVRvNs BTW I Love Evangelion This guy is nothing but a hater. Thought you guyz might get a kick out of this!

[]: Post by Eva 02 » Sun Aug 01, 2010 5:49 pm He's a jackass, his outfit alone disqualifies him from having an opinion on the internet - and its hard to be disqualified for that. I left him a comment, but I'm sure if he even read them he would post a new video with all this eva merch around him as a fan, apologizing...

[]: Post by KLVTZ » Sun Aug 01, 2010 5:52 pm Eva 02 wrote: He's a jackass, his outfit alone disqualifies him from having an opinion on the internet - and its hard to be disqualified for that. I left him a comment, but I'm sure if he even read them he would post a new video with all this eva merch around him as a fan, apologizing...

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 01, 2010 5:56 pm TROLL DETECTED Also, he's right... despite the hideous shirt.

[]: Successful troll is successful? Post by Killer Bee » Sun Aug 01, 2010 6:22 pm I clicked on that link expecting to get all riled up and whatever because of another idiot hating on Eva, but I ended up laughing through the whole thing. The guy's obviously not meant to be taken seriously; he's just doing videos in the tradition of guys like the Nostalgia Critic. He's just being humorous. These were the things he said: Entrusting the safety of the world to children is idiotic; Shinji is emo and looks like a retard in that picture; and even Eva fans don't know what the hell we're talking about. It was funny. He wasn't hating on it in a serious way. Oh, and that picture of the fish-faced anime girl that appears at the end? That was just posted by Xeroko in the Moonwalk thread earlier this week. I bet you he at least visits the forum, if he's not an outright member.

[]: Post by Eva 02 » Sun Aug 01, 2010 8:01 pm ^ He is not an anime fan whatsoever, from reading the comments. He would never come here, a simple search for "weird anime" should produce those pictures and other ones.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Aug 01, 2010 8:19 pm Who cares what he thinks. I found that video to be pretty funny if you ask me.

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Sun Aug 01, 2010 8:25 pm It is possible he's making a joke, but lots of people air the same views quite sincerely. I'm considering doing a survey of negative Evangelion reviews from MAL and seeing if they all have the following things in common: 1. Not paying attention to the show. 2. Knowing shit all about mental illness. The children thing is explained. Like, the whole mother-pilot relationship thing is... how... how do you miss that? And the master plan involves Yui-sama being bad-ass, not Shinji. The pilots are kind of fleshy cogs for a greater machine, as opposed to actual pilots. They're not flying fighter jets. Also, you could argue that the powers-that-be were not expecting the angels to come back so soon. If the angels waited six years, all the pilots would be twenty. If they'd come earlier, the pilots would be... younger. The e-m-o thing is also, for lack of a better word, an example of the medieval understanding of mental illness that permeates nearly every society on earth. Child soldiers are fucked up. End of story. Shinji still is largely more effective than most child soldiers. Most child soldiers don't survive so many battles without getting fucking killed. And even so, real child soldiers, just like the Eva pilots, are easily replaced. Now, when trying to convince friends to watch this show, the most commonly cited reason to ignore my recommendation is "WHY THE FUCK DO THEY USE CHILDREN?!" The show, to be honest, waits a long time before it explains this shit. The show makes the assumption that you are a huge otaku (as Anno-san may or may not have been trying to drive a certain message into the heads of otaku) and are totally accustomed to seeing child soldiers save the world, so he assumes you won't be asking these questions. But let's say the pilots were all adults. An adult Shinji might not complain outwardly, but there's a good chance he'd be just as fucked up, going through all the same ultra-depressed introspection. Assuming having crazy-ass pilots wasn't part of the master plan to begin with, a fair criticism would be that Nerv employs no mental health professions. Of course, that could be a reflection of Japan in the 1990s, where if you were a celebrity, suffering publicly from mental illness was a good way to get berated and humiliated by the media. And the idea that warriors need help for their mental health is... a rather new idea.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 01, 2010 8:45 pm ANIME SUCKS!! Priceless.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Aug 01, 2010 9:14 pm I opened the link, saw the guy, and immediately closed the window. Seriously, I didn't even have to listen to a single sentence he uttered. I may listen later for shits and giggles though.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Aug 01, 2010 9:17 pm A guy on the internet says he doesn't like Evangelion! Quickly, to the fan forums!

[]: Post by KLVTZ » Sun Aug 01, 2010 9:20 pm esselfortium wrote: A guy on the internet says he doesn't like Evangelion! Quickly, to the fan forums!

[]: Post by Sachi » Sun Aug 01, 2010 9:27 pm KLVTZ wrote: Correct!
